Olivia Brooks
Marketing Manager — Growth & Brand, New York, NY
olivia.brooks@example.com | 555-201-3008 | linkedin.com/in/olivia-brooks

SUMMARY
Marketing manager with 7 years driving demand generation, brand, and growth
marketing for consumer and B2B brands. Data-driven across paid and organic
channels, with a track record of scaling pipeline and improving funnel
conversion.

EXPERIENCE
Marketing Manager — Northstar Brands (2020–present)
- Own demand generation and growth marketing across SEO, SEM, paid social, and
  lifecycle email, scaling marketing-sourced pipeline 3x in two years.
- Lead brand campaigns and go-to-market launches with creative, PR, and product
  teams; manage a $4M annual media budget.
- Built marketing analytics dashboards tracking CAC, LTV, and funnel conversion
  to guide channel investment.

Digital Marketing Specialist — Bright Agency (2017–2020)
- Ran paid search and social campaigns for retail clients; optimized landing
  pages and ad creative to improve conversion and lower cost per acquisition.

SKILLS
Marketing, demand generation, growth marketing, brand, campaigns, SEO, SEM, paid
social, content marketing, go-to-market, positioning, marketing analytics, CAC,
LTV, funnel conversion, lifecycle, email marketing

EDUCATION
B.B.A. Marketing, Boston University, 2017
